zh.lifeSummary: 當Adela de Oyli於1178年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾德尼時，她的父親Fulco Oilly26歲，母親Matilda le Strange24歲。她於1200年與Sir Robert Constable of Halsham在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1251年在英國諾福爾可格萊斯頓--希亞享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adela de Oyli于1178年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾德尼时，她的父亲Fulco Oilly26岁，母亲Matilda le Strange24岁。她于1200年与Sir Robert Constable of Halsham在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1251年在英国諾福爾可格萊斯頓--希亞享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Adela
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Adele  , especially popular in the late 19th century.

variants.name: Adella
meanings: form of   Adele  , especially popular in the late 19th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Adela de Oyli was born in 1178, in Gedney, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Fulco Oilly, was 26 and her mother, Matilda le Strange, was 24. She married Sir Robert Constable of Halsham in 1200, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1251, in Gorleston-on-Sea, Norfolk, England, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adela de Oyli est née en 1178, à Gedney, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Fulco Oilly, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Matilda le Strange, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Constable of Halsham en 1200, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1251, à Gorleston-on-Sea, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adela de Oyli 1178 in Gedney, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Fulco Oilly 26 und ihre Mutter Matilda le Strange 24. Sie hat 1200 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Robert Constable of Halsham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1251 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Gorleston-on-Sea, Norfolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adela de Oyli è nata il nel 1178 nel Gedney, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Fulco Oilly, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Matilda le Strange, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert Constable of Halsham nel 1200, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1251, nel Gorleston-on-Sea, Norfolk, England, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adela de Oyliが1178年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアジェドニーで生まれた時，父Fulco Oillyは26歳，母Matilda le Strangeは24歳であった。1200年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでSir Robert Constable of Halshamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1251年にイギリスノーフォルクゴルレストン-オン-セアで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adela de Oyli(이)가 1178년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 게드니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Fulco Oilly(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda le Strange(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1200년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Sir Robert Constable of Halsham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1251년 영국 노르폴크 고를레스토--시에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adela de Oyli nasceu em 1178, em Gedney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Fulco Oilly, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Matilda le Strange, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert Constable of Halsham em 1200, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1251, em Gorleston-on-Sea, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adela de Oyli родилась в 1178 г. в местности джедни, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Fulco Oilly было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda le Strange, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Constable of Halsham в 1200 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1251 г. в местности горльстон-он-сеа, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adela de Oyli nació en 1178, en Gedney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Fulco Oilly, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Matilda le Strange, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Sir Robert Constable of Halsham en 1200, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1251, en Gorleston-on-Sea, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 73 años.
